title: Thelypteris unidentata
taxonomy: Thelypteris unidentata is classified in the kingdom Plantae, with more specific classification as follows: it belongs to the division Pteridophyta, the class Polypodiopsida, the order Polypodiales, the family Thelypteridaceae, and the genus Thelypteris. This classification indicates its position as a species of fern within the plant kingdom. As a member of the family Thelypteridaceae, it shares characteristics with other species in this family. The classification of Thelypteris unidentata also shows its unique position within the plant kingdom, separate from other types of plants. Its classification provides essential information for understanding its characteristics and behavior.
